all.en: Dear Department Managers, I hope this message finds you well.
all.zh: 各位部門經理您好，希望您一切順利。

all.en: This is Karen Lin from the Corporate Software Procurement office.
all.zh: 我是企業軟體採購處的 Karen Lin。

all.en: I am writing to flag two upcoming license renewals requiring your attention.
all.zh: 來信目的是提醒兩項即將到期、需要您留意的授權續約事項。

all.en: Our Adobe Creative Cloud enterprise agreement expires on June thirtieth.
all.zh: 我們的 Adobe Creative Cloud 企業合約將於六月三十日到期。

all.en: The Microsoft Office Three Sixty Five contract ends one month later.
all.zh: Microsoft Office 365 合約則於一個月後到期。

all.en: Combined annual spend on these two products exceeds eight hundred thousand dollars.
all.zh: 這兩項產品的年度合計支出超過八十萬美元。

all.en: Procurement must finalize renewal terms at least thirty days before expiration.
all.zh: 採購部門必須於到期前至少三十日完成續約條款。

all.en: We need updated headcount confirmations from each cost center by Friday.
all.zh: 我們需要各成本中心於週五前提供更新的人數確認。

all.en: Please review the attached spreadsheet listing your current active assignments.
all.zh: 請檢視附件試算表所列您目前的有效授權派發明細。

all.en: Each row shows the user name, department, and last login timestamp.
all.zh: 每一列顯示使用者姓名、部門及最後登入時間戳記。

all.en: Highlighted rows indicate accounts inactive for more than ninety days.
all.zh: 醒目標示的列為非活躍超過九十天的帳號。

all.en: Inactive Adobe licenses currently total one hundred forty-seven seats.
all.zh: 目前非活躍的 Adobe 授權共計一百四十七席。

all.en: Each seat costs approximately seven hundred dollars per year.
all.zh: 每席年度費用約為七百美元。

all.en: Reclaiming unused seats could save us over one hundred thousand dollars.
all.zh: 回收未使用席次可為我們節省超過十萬美元。

all.en: Please confirm whether listed inactive users still require Creative Cloud access.
all.zh: 請確認所列非活躍使用者是否仍需 Creative Cloud 存取權限。

all.en: If access is no longer needed, mark the user for removal.
all.zh: 若不再需要存取權限，請將該使用者標示為移除。

all.en: If the user requires only specific apps, we can downgrade their plan.
all.zh: 若使用者僅需特定應用程式，我們可將其方案降級。

all.en: The single-app plan costs around three hundred dollars annually per user.
all.zh: 單一應用程式方案每位使用者年費約為三百美元。

all.en: Please indicate replacement plans directly in column G of the spreadsheet.
all.zh: 請於試算表 G 欄直接註明替代方案。

all.en: For Microsoft Office, similar review criteria apply across all subscriptions.
all.zh: Microsoft Office 部分同樣適用相同的審查標準。

all.en: We currently maintain twenty-three hundred E3 licenses and two hundred E5 seats.
all.zh: 我們目前維護兩千三百個 E3 授權及兩百個 E5 席次。

all.en: E5 includes advanced security features such as Defender and audit logs.
all.zh: E5 包含 Defender 及稽核紀錄等進階安全功能。

all.en: Please verify that E5 users genuinely require these premium capabilities.
all.zh: 請確認 E5 使用者確實需要這些進階功能。

all.en: Downgrading unnecessary E5 seats yields significant cost savings annually.
all.zh: 將非必要的 E5 席次降級可帶來顯著的年度成本節省。

all.en: Our vendor has offered a five percent discount for early commitment.
all.zh: 供應商針對提早承諾續約提供百分之五的折扣。

all.en: This offer expires when we miss the May twenty-fifth deadline.
all.zh: 此優惠將於我們錯過五月二十五日截止日後失效。

all.en: Additionally, multi-year agreements lock in current pricing for three years.
all.zh: 此外，多年期合約可將現行價格鎖定三年。

all.en: Inflation has driven SaaS prices up by approximately eight percent industrywide.
all.zh: 通膨已使全產業 SaaS 價格上漲約百分之八。

all.en: Finance has recommended evaluating multi-year terms during this renewal cycle.
all.zh: 財務部建議於此次續約週期評估多年期合約。

all.en: Please discuss long-term staffing forecasts with your business partners.
all.zh: 請與您的業務夥伴討論長期人力規劃。

all.en: Indicate projected headcount changes through fiscal year twenty twenty-eight.
all.zh: 請註明預估至二〇二八會計年度的人力變動。

all.en: If your department plans significant hiring, we can negotiate growth allowances.
all.zh: 若您的部門計劃大幅招聘，我們可協商成長保留量。

all.en: These allowances let us add seats mid-contract at preferred rates.
all.zh: 此保留量讓我們可於合約期間以優惠價格新增席次。

all.en: Conversely, declining headcount areas may benefit from shorter renewal terms.
all.zh: 反之，人力萎縮的部門可能適合採用較短的續約期間。

all.en: I have scheduled brief consultations next Tuesday and Wednesday afternoons.
all.zh: 我已於下週二及週三下午安排簡短的諮詢會議。

all.en: Each meeting will last approximately twenty minutes per department.
all.zh: 每場會議每個部門約二十分鐘。

all.en: Please book a slot using the calendar link at the bottom of this email.
all.zh: 請使用本信末的行事曆連結預約時段。

all.en: Bring your departmental usage report and budget approver if possible.
all.zh: 請攜帶您的部門使用報告，並盡可能邀請預算核准人出席。

all.en: We can review reallocation options during these sessions together.
all.zh: 我們可於這些會議中一同檢視重新配置選項。

all.en: After consultations, I will compile final renewal quantities for executive approval.
all.zh: 諮詢後，我將彙整最終續約數量送交高層核准。

all.en: The Chief Financial Officer requires sign-off by June tenth at the latest.
all.zh: 財務長要求最遲於六月十日前簽核。

all.en: Any delays risk service interruption when current keys deactivate automatically.
all.zh: 任何延遲都可能在現行授權碼自動停用時造成服務中斷。

all.en: Deactivated licenses prevent users from opening files or saving changes.
all.zh: 停用授權將使使用者無法開啟檔案或儲存變更。

all.en: Last year, one department missed the deadline and lost two work days.
all.zh: 去年有一個部門錯過期限，因而損失兩個工作天。

all.en: We want to avoid similar disruptions during the summer project peak.
all.zh: 我們希望避免在夏季專案高峰期發生類似中斷。

all.en: Should you require alternative software options, please mention them early.
all.zh: 若您需要替代軟體選項，請及早告知。

all.en: Our team can evaluate competitor offerings such as Figma or Google Workspace.
all.zh: 我們團隊可評估 Figma 或 Google Workspace 等競品方案。

all.en: Migration costs and training time should be factored into any switch decision.
all.zh: 任何轉換決策都應將遷移成本與訓練時間納入考量。

all.en: Sticking with existing vendors usually offers the smoothest user experience.
all.zh: 沿用現有供應商通常能提供最順暢的使用者體驗。

all.en: Please attach signed approval forms when returning the completed spreadsheet.
all.zh: 回傳完成的試算表時請附上已簽署的核准表單。

all.en: Send everything to the procurement shared mailbox in PDF format.
all.zh: 請以 PDF 格式寄送所有資料至採購共用信箱。

all.en: We will acknowledge receipt within one business day automatically.
all.zh: 我們將於一個工作日內自動回覆收件確認。

all.en: Feel free to reach me directly at extension 4488 with urgent questions.
all.zh: 如有緊急問題，歡迎直接撥打分機 4488 與我聯繫。

all.en: Thank you for your cooperation in keeping our software portfolio efficient.
all.zh: 感謝您協助維持我們軟體組合的效率。

all.en: I look forward to receiving your responses by end of business Friday.
all.zh: 期待於週五下班前收到您的回覆。
